title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ECIL

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ECIL
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
